name: Calcolatore CAGR
description: Calcola il tasso di crescita annuo composto di un investimento.
seo_description: Calcola il tasso di crescita annuo composto di un investimento. Calcolatore gratuito, preciso e istantaneo. Strumento gratuito con formula ed esempi.
example_label: Calcolating CAGR for investment that grew from $50,000 to $89,000 over 7 years.
result_context: The CAGR of {cagr}% represents the smoothed annual growth rate that would produce this result.
mistakes: Using arithmetic average instead of geometric (CAGR) for multi-year returns
Not accounting for cash flows during the investment period
Assuming CAGR reflects attuale year-by-year performance
